passage_title: Why fairy tales are really scary tales

sentences.sentence: People of every culture tell each other fairy tales, but the same story often takes a variety of forms in different parts of the world.
sentences.translation: 每一种文化中的人都会互相讲童话故事，但同一个故事在世界不同地区往往会呈现出多种形式。

structure.text: but the same story often takes a variety of forms in different parts of the world
in different parts of the world

difficult_points: People of every culture 中 of every culture 后置限定 people，表示范围覆盖所有文化。
but 连接两个并列分句，前半句讲童话的普遍性，后半句转向同一故事的变体。
takes a variety of forms 是抽象搭配，表示“呈现多种形式”。

expressions.text: in different parts of the world

sentences.sentence: In the story of Little Red Riding Hood that European children are familiar with, a young girl on the way to see her grandmother meets a wolf and tells him where she is going.
sentences.translation: 在欧洲儿童熟悉的《小红帽》故事中，一个去看望祖母的小女孩遇到了一只狼，并告诉它自己要去哪里。

structure.text: In the story of Little Red Riding Hood that European children are familiar with
that European children are familiar with
a young girl on the way to see her grandmother
meets a wolf and tells him where she is going

difficult_points: that European children are familiar with 是定语从句，修饰 Little Red Riding Hood。
on the way to see her grandmother 后置修饰 a young girl，说明她正在去祖母家的路上。
where she is going 是 tells 的宾语从句，表示告诉狼目的地。

sentences.sentence: The wolf runs on ahead and disposes of the grandmother, then gets into bed dressed in the grandmother's clothes to wait for Little Red Riding Hood.
sentences.translation: 狼先跑到前面，除掉了祖母，然后穿着祖母的衣服上床躺下，等待小红帽到来。

structure.text: runs on ahead and disposes of the grandmother
to wait for Little Red Riding Hood

difficult_points: runs on ahead 中 on 强调继续向前跑，ahead 表示抢先一步。
dressed in the grandmother's clothes 是过去分词短语，说明狼上床时的装扮状态。
to wait for Little Red Riding Hood 表示目的，即狼这样做是为了等待小红帽。

sentences.sentence: You may think you know the story – but which version?
sentences.translation: 你也许以为自己知道这个故事——但你知道的是哪个版本呢？
difficult_points: may think 表示一种推测或让步，为后面的反问做铺垫。
破折号后的 but which version 是省略问句，完整意思是“但你知道的是哪个版本”。

sentences.sentence: In some versions, the wolf swallows up the grandmother, while in others it locks her in a cupboard.
sentences.translation: 在一些版本中，狼把祖母吞了下去；而在另一些版本中，它把祖母锁进了橱柜。

structure.text: the wolf swallows up the grandmother
while in others it locks her in a cupboard

difficult_points: while 在这里表示对比，而不是单纯的时间关系。
others 省略了 versions，指“其他版本”。
swallows up 中 up 强化动作完成，表示整个吞下。

sentences.sentence: In some stories Red Riding Hood gets the better of the wolf on her own, while in others a hunter or a woodcutter hears her cries and comes to her rescue.
sentences.translation: 在一些故事中，小红帽独自战胜了狼；而在另一些故事中，猎人或樵夫听到她的呼喊并前来救她。

structure.text: Red Riding Hood gets the better of the wolf on her own
while in others a hunter or a woodcutter hears her cries and comes to her rescue
hears her cries and comes to her rescue

difficult_points: gets the better of 是固定表达，表示“战胜、占上风”。
on her own 强调小红帽没有依靠别人帮助。
while 引导对比，说明不同版本中解救方式不同。

sentences.sentence: The universal appeal of these tales is frequently attributed to the idea that they contain cautionary messages: in the case of Little Red Riding Hood, to listen to your mother, and avoid talking to strangers.
sentences.translation: 这些故事的普遍吸引力常被归因于这样一种观点：它们包含警示信息；就《小红帽》而言，就是要听母亲的话，并避免和陌生人交谈。

structure.text: The universal appeal of these tales
is frequently attributed to the idea
in the case of Little Red Riding Hood
to listen to your mother, and avoid talking to strangers

difficult_points: is frequently attributed to 是被动结构，说明人们常把普遍吸引力归因于某个原因。
that they contain cautionary messages 是 the idea 的同位语从句，解释这个 idea 的内容。
冒号后用不定式短语具体说明《小红帽》中的警示信息。

sentences.sentence: 'It might be what we find interesting about this story is that it's got this survival-relevant information in it,' says anthropologist Jamie Tehrani at Durham University in the UK.
sentences.translation: 英国杜伦大学人类学家杰米·特赫拉尼说：“我们觉得这个故事有趣的地方，可能在于它包含与生存相关的信息。”

structure.text: what we find interesting about this story
is that it's got this survival-relevant information in it
says anthropologist Jamie Tehrani at Durham University in the UK

difficult_points: what we find interesting about this story 是名词性从句，整体作被强调或说明的内容。
that it's got this survival-relevant information in it 是表语从句，说明故事有趣的原因。
引语后的 says 位于主语 anthropologist Jamie Tehrani 前，是引述语序。

sentences.sentence: But his research suggests otherwise.
sentences.translation: 但他的研究表明情况并非如此。
difficult_points: But 表示转折，否定前一句关于警示信息解释的倾向。
otherwise 指代“不是前面所说的那样”，需要结合上文理解。

sentences.sentence: 'We have this huge gap in our knowledge about the history and prehistory of storytelling, despite the fact that we know this genre is an incredibly ancient one,' he says.
sentences.translation: 他说：“关于讲故事的历史和史前史，我们的认识存在巨大空白，尽管我们知道这一体裁极其古老。”

structure.text: have this huge gap in our knowledge about the history and prehistory of storytelling
despite the fact that we know this genre is an incredibly ancient one
that we know this genre is an incredibly ancient one

difficult_points: despite the fact that 引出让步内容，表示“尽管事实是……”。
huge gap in our knowledge 指知识空白，不是实体上的缺口。
one 指代前面的 genre，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: That hasn't stopped anthropologists, folklorists* and other academics devising theories to explain the importance of fairy tales in human society.
sentences.translation: 但这并没有阻止人类学家、民俗学家和其他学者提出理论，来解释童话在人类社会中的重要性。

structure.text: to explain the importance of fairy tales in human society

difficult_points: That 指代前一句所说的“知识存在巨大空白”这一情况。
stop someone doing something 表示“阻止某人做某事”，这里是否定完成时。
to explain... 是目的不定式，说明提出理论的目的。

sentences.sentence: Now Tehrani has found a way to test these ideas, borrowing a technique from evolutionary biologists.
sentences.translation: 如今，特赫拉尼借用进化生物学家的技术，找到了一种检验这些观点的方法。

structure.text: has found a way to test these ideas
borrowing a technique from evolutionary biologists

difficult_points: has found 是现在完成时，强调到目前为止已经找到了方法。
to test these ideas 后置修饰 a way，说明这种方法的用途。
borrowing a technique... 是现在分词短语，补充说明方法来源。

sentences.sentence: To work out the evolutionary history, development and relationships among groups of organisms, biologists compare the characteristics of living species in a process called 'phylogenetic analysis'.
sentences.translation: 为了弄清生物群体之间的进化历史、发展过程和关系，生物学家会在一种名为“系统发育分析”的过程中比较现存物种的特征。

structure.text: To work out the evolutionary history, development and relationships among groups of organisms
compare the characteristics of living species

difficult_points: To work out... 位于句首表示目的，不是主语。
evolutionary history, development and relationships 是并列宾语，均受 work out 支配。
called 'phylogenetic analysis' 是过去分词短语，后置说明 process 的名称。

sentences.sentence: Tehrani has used the same approach to compare related versions of fairy tales to discover how they have evolved and which elements have survived longest.
sentences.translation: 特赫拉尼使用同样的方法来比较相互关联的童话版本，以发现它们如何演变，以及哪些元素保留得最久。

structure.text: to compare related versions of fairy tales
to discover how they have evolved and which elements have survived longest
how they have evolved and which elements have survived longest

difficult_points: has used 是现在完成时，说明这种方法已被用于童话研究。
两个 to 不定式分别表示比较对象和研究目的。
how... and which... 是并列宾语从句，共同作 discover 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: Tehrani's analysis focused on Little Red Riding Hood in its many forms, which include another Western fairy tale known as The Wolf and the Kids.
sentences.translation: 特赫拉尼的分析聚焦于多种形式的《小红帽》，其中还包括另一个西方童话《狼和小羊们》。

structure.text: focused on Little Red Riding Hood in its many forms
which include another Western fairy tale known as The Wolf and the Kids
known as The Wolf and the Kids

difficult_points: focused on 表示研究对象集中在《小红帽》的多种形式上。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 these forms 包含另一则童话。
known as... 是过去分词短语，说明另一个童话的名称。

sentences.sentence: Checking for variants of these two tales and similar stories from Africa, East Asia and other regions, he ended up with 58 stories recorded from oral traditions.
sentences.translation: 在查找这两个故事以及来自非洲、东亚和其他地区的相似故事的变体后，他最终获得了 58 个来自口头传统记录的故事。

structure.text: Checking for variants of these two tales and similar stories from Africa, East Asia and other regions

difficult_points: Checking for... 是现在分词短语，表示主句动作之前或伴随的查找过程。
ended up with 表示最终得到某种结果。
recorded from oral traditions 后置修饰 58 stories，说明故事来源。

sentences.sentence: Once his phylogenetic analysis had established that they were indeed related, he used the same methods to explore how they have developed and altered over time.
sentences.translation: 一旦他的系统发育分析确认这些故事确实相关，他便使用同样的方法探索它们如何随着时间发展和改变。

structure.text: Once his phylogenetic analysis had established that they were indeed related
had established that they were indeed related
to explore how they have developed and altered over time

difficult_points: Once 引导时间条件从句，表示“在……之后/一旦……”。
had established 是过去完成时，说明确认相关性发生在使用方法进一步探索之前。
how they have developed and altered over time 是 explore 的宾语从句。

sentences.sentence: First he tested some assumptions about which aspects of the story alter least as it evolves, indicating their importance.
sentences.translation: 首先，他检验了一些假设，即故事的哪些方面在演变过程中改变最少，从而显示出它们的重要性。

structure.text: about which aspects of the story alter least as it evolves

difficult_points: about which aspects... 是介词 about 后接的宾语从句，说明 assumptions 的内容。
as it evolves 是时间从句，表示故事演变的过程中。
indicating their importance 是现在分词短语，说明“改变最少”所体现的意义。

sentences.sentence: Folklorists believe that what happens in a story is more central to the story than the characters in it – that visiting a relative, only to be met by a scary animal in disguise, is more fundamental than whether the visitor is a little girl or three siblings, or the animal is a tiger instead of a wolf.
sentences.translation: 民俗学家认为，故事中发生的事情比其中的角色更为核心——也就是说，去拜访亲戚却遇到伪装的可怕动物，比来访者是小女孩还是三个兄弟姐妹、动物是老虎而不是狼更为根本。

structure.text: that what happens in a story is more central to the story than the characters in it
that visiting a relative, only to be met by a scary animal in disguise, is more fundamental than whether the visitor is a little girl or three siblings, or the animal is a tiger instead of a wolf
only to be met by a scary animal in disguise

difficult_points: 第一个 that 引导 believe 的宾语从句，其中 what happens in a story 是从句主语。
破折号后的 that 从句进一步解释前一句观点，属于同位或补充说明。
only to be met by... 是结果意味的不定式，表示“结果却遇到……”。
whether... or... 引出对比选项，说明角色差异没有情节核心重要。

sentences.sentence: However, Tehrani found no significant difference in the rate of evolution of incidents compared with that of characters.
sentences.translation: 然而，特赫拉尼发现，事件演变的速度与角色演变的速度相比并没有显著差异。

structure.text: in the rate of evolution of incidents

difficult_points: However 表示与上一段民俗学家假设相反的研究结果。
no significant difference 是研究结果中的否定表达，强调差异不显著。
that of characters 中 that 指代 the rate of evolution，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: 'Certain episodes are very stable because they are crucial to the story, but there are lots of other details that can evolve quite freely,' he says.
sentences.translation: 他说：“某些情节非常稳定，因为它们对故事至关重要，但还有许多其他细节可以相当自由地演变。”

structure.text: because they are crucial to the story
but there are lots of other details that can evolve quite freely

difficult_points: because 引导原因从句，解释某些情节稳定的原因。
there are... 是存在句，引出可以自由变化的细节。
that can evolve quite freely 是定语从句，修饰 details。

sentences.sentence: Neither did his analysis support the theory that the central section of a story is the most conserved part.
sentences.translation: 他的分析也并不支持这样一种理论：故事的中心部分是保存最完好的部分。

structure.text: that the central section of a story is the most conserved part

difficult_points: Neither 位于句首触发部分倒装，所以用 did his analysis support。
Neither 承接前一句否定结果，表示“也不”。
that 从句是 the theory 的同位语，说明理论的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: He found no significant difference in the flexibility of events there compared with the beginning or the end.
sentences.translation: 他发现，故事中心部分事件的可变性与开头或结尾相比并无显著差异。

structure.text: in the flexibility of events there
compared with the beginning or the end

difficult_points: there 指代上一句中的 the central section of a story。
the flexibility of events 表示事件是否容易变化的程度。
compared with... 后置说明比较对象。

sentences.sentence: But the really big surprise came when he looked at the cautionary elements of the story.
sentences.translation: 但真正令人非常意外的发现，出现在他研究故事中的警示性元素时。

structure.text: when he looked at the cautionary elements of the story

difficult_points: But 表示进一步转折，引出比前面发现更意外的结果。
came when... 中 came 不译作“走来”，而是表示“出现于……时候”。
cautionary elements 指故事中具有警示作用的内容。

expressions.meaning_zh: 真正重大而意外的发现

sentences.sentence: 'Studies on hunter-gatherer folk tales suggest that these narratives include really important information about the environment and the possible dangers that may be faced there – stuff that's relevant to survival,' he says.
sentences.translation: 他说：“关于狩猎采集者民间故事的研究表明，这些叙事包含关于环境以及那里可能面临的危险的重要信息——也就是与生存相关的东西。”

structure.text: suggest that these narratives include really important information about the environment and the possible dangers that may be faced there
that these narratives include really important information about the environment and the possible dangers that may be faced there

difficult_points: suggest 后接 that 宾语从句，说明研究得出的结论。
that may be faced there 是定语从句，修饰 dangers，并使用被动语态。
破折号后的 stuff that's relevant to survival 对前面的重要信息作概括说明。

expressions.meaning_zh: 狩猎采集者的民间故事

sentences.sentence: Yet in his analysis such elements were just as flexible as seemingly trivial details.
sentences.translation: 然而，在他的分析中，这类元素和看似琐碎的细节一样容易变化。

structure.text: were just as flexible as seemingly trivial details

difficult_points: Yet 表示与“警示信息重要”这一预期相反的结果。
such elements 指代上一句中的 cautionary elements 和 survival-relevant information。
as flexible as... 是同级比较，表示可变性相同。

sentences.sentence: What, then, is important enough to be reproduced from generation to generation?
sentences.translation: 那么，究竟什么足够重要，以至于会被一代又一代地复述下来呢？

structure.text: to be reproduced from generation to generation

difficult_points: What 是疑问代词作主语，询问真正被保留下来的关键因素。
important enough to be reproduced 是 enough to 结构，表示“足够重要以至于被……”。
to be reproduced 使用被动语态，强调内容被一代代复述。

sentences.sentence: The answer, it would appear, is fear – blood-thirsty and gruesome aspects of the story, such as the eating of the grandmother by the wolf, turned out to be the best preserved of all.
sentences.translation: 答案似乎是恐惧——故事中嗜血而可怕的方面，比如狼吃掉祖母这一情节，结果是所有元素中保存得最好的。

structure.text: blood-thirsty and gruesome aspects of the story
turned out to be the best preserved of all

difficult_points: it would appear 是插入语，表示作者谨慎地说“似乎”。
破折号后的 blood-thirsty and gruesome aspects 解释 fear 指的具体内容。
such as... 插入举例，说明可怕元素包括狼吃掉祖母。
turned out to be 表示研究结果最终显示。

expressions.meaning_zh: 所有元素中保存最好的

sentences.sentence: Why are these details retained by generations of storytellers, when other features are not?
sentences.translation: 当其他特征没有被保留下来时，为什么这些细节会被一代代讲故事的人保留下来呢？

structure.text: are these details retained by generations of storytellers

difficult_points: are retained 是被动语态，强调细节被讲述者保留。
by generations of storytellers 指动作执行者，表示一代代讲故事的人。
when other features are not 中 are not 后省略 retained，形成对比。

sentences.sentence: Tehrani has an idea: 'In an oral context, a story won't survive because of one great teller.
sentences.translation: 特赫拉尼有一个想法：“在口头传播的语境中，一个故事不会仅仅因为某个优秀讲述者而流传下来。

structure.text: won't survive because of one great teller

difficult_points: 冒号后进入直接引语，解释 Tehrani 的 idea。
In an oral context 表示口头传播环境，是理解 story won't survive 的背景。
because of one great teller 是介词短语作原因状语，否定的是“仅靠一个讲得好的人”。

expressions.meaning_zh: 口头语境；口头传播环境

sentences.sentence: It also needs to be interesting when it's told by someone who's not necessarily a great storyteller.'
sentences.translation: 它还需要在由并不一定擅长讲故事的人讲述时依然有趣。”

structure.text: when it's told by someone who's not necessarily a great storyteller
who's not necessarily a great storyteller

difficult_points: It 指代上一句中的 a story，即一个故事。
needs to be interesting 表示故事本身必须具备吸引力。
when it's told by someone... 是时间/条件背景，强调不同讲述者下仍需有趣。

sentences.sentence: Maybe being swallowed whole by a wolf, then cut out of its stomach alive is so gripping that it helps the story remain popular, no matter how badly it's told.
sentences.translation: 也许被狼整个吞下、随后又被从它肚子里活着切出来这个情节太扣人心弦了，以至于无论讲得多糟，都能帮助故事保持流行。

structure.text: being swallowed whole by a wolf, then cut out of its stomach alive
that it helps the story remain popular
no matter how badly it's told

difficult_points: being swallowed... 是动名词短语作主语，描述故事情节而非真实事件。
then cut out of its stomach alive 省略了 being，与 being swallowed 并列。
so gripping that... 是 so...that 结果结构，说明情节带来的效果。
no matter how badly it's told 是让步从句，表示不管讲述质量多差。

sentences.sentence: Jack Zipes at the University of Minnesota, Minneapolis, is unconvinced by Tehrani's views on fairy tales.
sentences.translation: 明尼阿波利斯明尼苏达大学的杰克·齐普斯并不认同特赫拉尼关于童话的观点。

structure.text: Jack Zipes at the University of Minnesota, Minneapolis
is unconvinced by Tehrani's views on fairy tales
at the University of Minnesota, Minneapolis
by Tehrani's views on fairy tales

difficult_points: at the University of Minnesota, Minneapolis 后置说明 Jack Zipes 的任职或所属机构。
is unconvinced by 是被动形式的形容词结构，表示“不被说服”。
views on fairy tales 中 on 表示“关于……的观点”。

sentences.sentence: 'Even if they're gruesome, they won't stick unless they matter,' he says.
sentences.translation: 他说：“即使它们很可怕，如果没有意义，也不会流传下来。”
difficult_points: Even if 引导让步从句，表示“即便很恐怖”。
stick 在这里不是“粘住”，而是指内容被记住并流传。
unless they matter 表示条件，“除非它们有意义”。

sentences.sentence: He believes the perennial theme of women as victims in stories like Little Red Riding Hood explains why they continue to feel relevant.
sentences.translation: 他认为，在《小红帽》这类故事中女性作为受害者这一经久不衰的主题，解释了为什么这些故事持续让人觉得有现实意义。

structure.text: the perennial theme of women as victims in stories like Little Red Riding Hood explains why they continue to feel relevant
the perennial theme of women as victims in stories like Little Red Riding Hood
why they continue to feel relevant

difficult_points: believes 后省略了 that，引导一个宾语从句。
the perennial theme... 是从句中的主语，中心词是 theme。
why they continue to feel relevant 是 explains 的宾语从句。
they 指代 stories like Little Red Riding Hood，而不是 women。

expressions.meaning_zh: 持续让人觉得有现实意义

sentences.sentence: But Tehrani points out that although this is often the case in Western versions, it is not always true elsewhere.
sentences.translation: 但特赫拉尼指出，虽然在西方版本中情况常常如此，但在其他地方并不总是这样。

structure.text: that although this is often the case in Western versions, it is not always true elsewhere
although this is often the case in Western versions
it is not always true elsewhere

difficult_points: points out 后接 that 宾语从句，提出反驳意见。
although 引导让步从句，承认西方版本中常见这种情况。
this 和 it 都指代上一句“女性作为受害者”的主题。

expressions.meaning_zh: 在其他地方并不总是成立

sentences.sentence: In Chinese and Japanese versions, often known as The Tiger Grandmother, the villain is a woman, and in both Iran and Nigeria, the victim is a boy.
sentences.translation: 在中国和日本的版本中，这些版本常被称为《老虎外婆》，反派是女性；而在伊朗和尼日利亚的版本中，受害者是男孩。

structure.text: often known as The Tiger Grandmother
and in both Iran and Nigeria, the victim is a boy

difficult_points: often known as The Tiger Grandmother 是插入的过去分词短语，说明这些版本的名称。
the villain 和 the victim 形成对照，说明不同地区的角色设定不同。
and 连接两个并列分句，第二个分句前置了地点状语。

sentences.sentence: Mathias Clasen at Aarhus University in Denmark isn't surprised by Tehrani's findings.
sentences.translation: 丹麦奥胡斯大学的马蒂亚斯·克拉森对特赫拉尼的发现并不感到惊讶。

structure.text: Mathias Clasen at Aarhus University in Denmark

difficult_points: at Aarhus University in Denmark 后置说明 Mathias Clasen 的机构信息。
isn't surprised by 是形容词加介词结构，表示对某发现不惊讶。
findings 指研究发现，而不是“找到的物品”。

sentences.sentence: 'Habits and morals change, but the things that scare us, and the fact that we seek out entertainment that's designed to scare us – those are constant,' he says.
sentences.translation: 他说：“习惯和道德观会改变，但令我们害怕的事物，以及我们会主动寻找旨在吓到我们的娱乐这一事实——这些是不变的。”

structure.text: but the things that scare us, and the fact that we seek out entertainment that's designed to scare us

difficult_points: but 后的主语较长，由 the things... 和 the fact... 两部分并列组成。
that scare us 和 that's designed to scare us 都是定语从句，分别修饰 things 和 entertainment。
破折号后的 those 总结前面两个并列主语，并接 are constant。
seek out 表示主动寻找，比 seek 更强调有目的地去找。

sentences.sentence: Clasen believes that scary stories teach us what it feels like to be afraid without having to experience real danger, and so build up resistance to negative emotions.
sentences.translation: 克拉森认为，恐怖故事教会我们害怕是什么感觉，而无需亲身经历真正的危险，并因此帮助我们增强对负面情绪的抵抗力。

structure.text: that scary stories teach us what it feels like to be afraid without having to experience real danger
what it feels like to be afraid
without having to experience real danger
and so build up resistance to negative emotions

difficult_points: believes 后的 that 从句说明 Clasen 的观点。
what it feels like to be afraid 是 teach us 的直接内容，it 是形式主语结构的一部分。
without having to experience real danger 表示无需真实经历危险这一条件。
and so build up... 与 teach us 共享主语 scary stories，说明结果。
